Read Docs/AgToosa_Concise.md and toggle ultra-compressed communication mode.

Sub-command dispatch:
- No argument → toggle caveman mode
- `on` → activate: drop filler, keep technical precision, max 3 sentences per response
- `off` → deactivate: return to normal AgToosa communication style
